description:
Advances: mutagen.cli

Deliverable: migrate .spec/specs/cli.spec.md to the SpecLedEx schema:
  - spec-scenarios block: reshape each scenario to given:/when:/then: arrays
    (current bespoke shape fails parse with 'expected array').
  - spec-verification block: replace execute:/source_file: stubs with
    command: and target: entries; every requirement gets a verification entry.
  - spec-meta: flip status: draft -> active once the file validates.
  - leave the prose, intent, id, surface, decisions links intact.

Verification:
  - mix spec.validate emits ZERO errors for subject mutagen.cli
    (baseline before migration: 4 errors on this file)
  - the subject's status is active in .spec/state.json

Out of Scope (files): every .spec.md EXCEPT cli.spec.md; lib/**; test/**.
Allowed touches: .spec/specs/cli.spec.md only.
Out of Scope (intent): do NOT author realized_by bindings (phase2); do NOT
  edit code or tests; do NOT alter requirement ids or delete requirements.
Merge gate: mix spec.validate (0 errors for mutagen.cli) && mix compile --warnings-as-errors && mix test
title: migrate mutagen.cli to SpecLedEx schema (4 findings)
